# kong.conf

# Admin API configuration
admin_listen = "0.0.0.0:8001"

# Proxy API configuration
proxy_listen = "0.0.0.0:8000"

# Database connection settings
database = "kong"
pg_host = "localhost"
pg_port = 5432
pg_user = "kong"
pg_password = "kong"
